description: OpenMV Cam AE3 (Alif Ensemble, OSPI flash + MRAM ROMFS).
_source: openmv/boards/OPENMV_AE3/board_config.h OMV_ROMFS_PART0_LENGTH = 0x01800000 (24 MiB, OSPI). PART1 = 1 MiB MRAM.
_notes: AE3 has a second ROMFS part in MRAM (1 MiB, no-erase). The MRAM path needs
the explicit 0xFF status-stripe handling called out in the plan's per-board notes.
board_id and firmware_version are placeholders (0) pending the schemes.
